settings.title: Your Perfect Companion for Every Ocean Adventure
settings.text:
Introducing the Sulawesi and Mentawai Eco-Neoprene spring suits, crafted for
women who thrive in the water. Whether you're surfing, paddleboarding, or
diving, these women's wetsuits offer a snug, second-skin fit that moves with
you, letting you stay out on the waves as long as you desire.

Eco-Friendly and Sustainable
Choosing these suits means choosing to care for the ocean you love. Our GT3
recycled PET lining and eco-conscious materials reduce your environmental
footprint, letting you embrace each wave with pride, knowing you're making a
difference.

Stay Warm and Protected
Made with our 2.5mm Eco-neoprene, these spring suits keep you warm and shielded
from harmful UV rays, extending your time in the water and providing all-day comfort for your water adventures. The limestone-based
neoprene not only enhances performance but also reflects our commitment to the
environment, offering a more sustainable alternative to traditional wetsuits.

Secure, Non-Slip Fit
Designed for active water women, our high stretch material allows for full range of movement and are built
to stay in place through every wave, dive, and paddle. Feel confident knowing
that your suit won't slip or shift, allowing you to focus on the thrill of the
moment, worry-free.

Versatile and Stylish
One suit for every adventure. With sleek designs and bold colors, these women's wetsuits not
only enhance your performance but also boost your confidence, letting you look and feel incredible both in and out of the water.


The Sulawesi and Mentawai
are more than just women’s wetsuits—they’re your trusted companions for every
ocean journey.

settings.title: Great Fit and Style
settings.text: Hard to believe, but it looks even better in person. Great fit and very flattering.
settings.author: Jeanne Dalton Justice (Cambridge, US)

settings.title: A conscious, modern suit perfect for any ocean Woman
settings.text: This suit belongs now in my ocean wardrobe and is perfect for surfing and freediving. The fit and material are fantastic, I also love the modern and sophisticated design 💙 Thank you Ocean Soul
settings.author: Sandra Petsch

settings.title: How warm are the limestone wetsuits?
settings.content: Our womens wetsuits are both 2.5mm and insulated with PET lining. They are the perfect spring suit for in between seasons.

settings.title: How durable are the spring suits for water sports?
settings.content: Our spring suits are made from durable, limestone-based Eco-prene neoprene, designed to last through intense water sports like surfing, paddleboarding, and freediving. Its high-quality construction with PK Zips and are constructed with Triple Glue blind stitched. Which means this spring suit will stay strong and flexible, session after session.

settings.title: How should I care for my women’s wetsuit to make it last longer?
settings.content: To extend the life of your women’s wetsuit, it’s essential to rinse it with fresh water after each use to remove salt, sand, and chlorine. Hang it in a shaded area to dry, avoiding direct sunlight to prevent damage to the Eco-prene neoprene.

settings.title: I'm not sure what size I am in wetsuit
settings.content:
We have our size chart for the Neoprene here.

You can also reach out to us directly for further assistance via email.

settings.title: Can I return it if it's not the right size or if I don't like it?
settings.content: Absolutely! Process all returns via our website portal here.

settings.title: Are these spring suits only for surfing and diving?
settings.content: Our spring suits are designed for all water lovers! Some of our customers buy them just for snorkelling or swimming when the water is cold.

settings.title: What should I do if my wetsuit develops creases
settings.content: Creasing is a normal occurrence with spring suits and other wetsuits, especially after storing them folded. To reduce creases, store your wetsuit by hanging it on a thick, wide hanger. Over time, any minor creases will smooth out, but proper storage helps maintain the suit’s form.

settings.title: Will this wetsuit last for long?
How long is shipping?
settings.content: We dispatch from Australia, so domestic post is 3-4 days. All international orders sent via regular post is 2 weeks, or via express is 7 days.
